Title: Strategic Data Analyst - Global Business Solutions - Austin
Description:
Responsibilities
About Us
The Global Business Solutions (GBS) team is responsible for the revenue growth of the TikTok business, and our teams include Sales, Marketing, Ops, Account Managers, Agency and Partnerships, as well as Marketing Science.
At TikTok, our Global Business Solutions (GBS) team plays a key role in generating revenue by promoting our advertising solutions, onboarding new clients, driving ad campaigns, and more. As the TikTok community grows at an unprecedented speed around the world, our GBS team leads groundbreaking projects that are changing the landscape of the advertising industry in real time.

About The Role
We are looking for a Client Solutions Strategic Data Analyst to join our Client Solutions Team for the North America region. This role will play a key part in developing strategic, customized solutions that connect TikTok’s advertising products with clients’ business objectives.

The Strategic Data Analyst works closely with Sales, Product, Measurement, and Operations teams to design data-driven strategies and tailored solutions for complex business challenges. This will include generating insights, using data and business research, to proactively identify revenue opportunities. The role combines consultative thinking, strong analytical capabilities, and deep knowledge of media products to unlock growth opportunities for clients and the business.

In addition to responding to client needs, this role proactively identifies opportunities to drive product adoption, improve go-to-market strategies, and strengthen the implementation of TikTok’s global commercial frameworks.
Success in this role requires strategic thinking, strong analytical capabilities, cross-functional collaboration, and the ability to translate data into actionable insights and scalable solutions.

Responsibilities
- Perform regular monitoring of key business metrics to provide on-time feedback to relevant stakeholders of the outliers or actionable trends observed
- Prepare weekly/monthly/bi-monthly business review reports for leaders and key stakeholders to drive business decision-making and alignment
- Analyze campaign and business performance data to identify strategic insights, trends, and optimization opportunities
- Develop data-driven recommendations that improve client outcomes and inform TikTok’s go-to-market strategies
- Generate insights on revenue opportunities at a product and vertical level
- Maintain team documents to ensure relevance (e.g., data mapping, support schedules)
- Collaborate with operational leaders to ensure smooth project execution, drive stakeholder communication/alignment, govern the project timeline, and ensure ownership

Qualifications
Minimum Qualification(s):
- 3+ years in a digital marketing company, with proven experience in business analysis and project management
- Practical skills and experience with data analytics and visualization tools such as Excel, SQL, Tableau, Thinkcell, and PowerPoint
- Experience working with data analysis and insights generation, including querying, data interpretation, and dashboard analysis
- Able to storytell based on multiple data sources and business context to derive meaningful and strategic insights for the business
- Excellent English written (clear document writing, presentation making) and verbal communication skills

Preferred Qualification(s):
- Strategic thinking capacity, able to quickly understand the business and discover the connection between business and data performance, and the ability to translate complex data into clear business recommendations and strategic narratives
- Strong business analytical skills with the ability to collect, organise, analyse, and disseminate significant amounts of information with attention to detail and data accuracy
- Ability to work cross-functionally with multiple teams and stakeholders; excellent relationship-building, collaboration, negotiation, and influence skills
- Ability to work in a fast-paced, dynamic environment and adapt to changes

About TikTok
TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok's global headquarters are in Los Angeles and Singapore, and we also have offices in New York City, London, Dublin, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo.​


Why Join Us
Inspiring creativity is at the core of TikTok's mission. Our innovative product is built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy - a mission we work towards every day.​
We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.​
​
Diversity & Inclusion​
TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.​


TikTok Accommodation
TikTok is committed to providing reasonable accommodations in our recruitment processes for candidates with disabilities, pregnancy, sincerely held religious beliefs or other reasons protected by applicable laws. If you need assistance or a reasonable accommodation, please reach out to us at https://tinyurl.com/RA-request​

Title: Data Analyst (Geospatial/Visualization)
Description:
About Peraton

Peraton is a next-generation national security company that drives missions of consequence spanning the globe and extending to the farthest reaches of the galaxy. As the world's leading mission capability integrator and transformative enterprise IT provider, we deliver trusted, highly differentiated solutions and technologies to protect our nation and allies. Peraton operates at the critical nexus between traditional and nontraditional threats across all domains: land, sea, space, air, and cyberspace. The company serves as a valued partner to essential government agencies and supports every branch of the U.S. armed forces. Each day, our employees solve the most daunting challenges that our customers face. Visit peraton.com to learn how we're keeping people around the world safe and secure.

About The Role

Peraton seeks a Data Analyst (Geospatial/Visualization) to support USPACOM in conducting MRT-C mapping/assessments and data analytics for PACOM AOR capabilities/assets.

Location: Fort Meade (Annapolis Junction), MD

In this role, you will be part of the MRTC Data Anaytics team supporting a forward team in multiple PACOM locations.

Primary responsibilities:


Develop geospatial visualizations of C4/Cyber terrain across the USPACOM/USINDOPACOM AOR based on travel team collections and HQ analysis
Produce maps, overlays, and network diagrams depicting physical and logical dependencies
Support common operational picture (COP) development and cross-domain information sharing
Maintain geospatial data layers and update baseline visualizations as terrain data is collected and validated


Qualifications

Required Qualifiications:


Minimum of 8 years with BS/BA; Minimum of 6 years with MS/MA; Minimum of 3 years with PhD. Will consider Associates with 10 years or High School with 12 years of expereience.
Proficiency in GIS tools (ArcGIS, QGIS) and geospatial analysis
Experience with network visualization tools (Palantir, Maltego, or equivalent)
Familiarity with military mapping standards and operational overlays
Knowledge of USINDOPACOM geographic AOR and theater infrastructure
U.S Citizenship required
Active TS with ability to obtain/maintain SCI


Details

Target Salary Range: $135,000 - $216,000. This represents the typical salary range for this position. Salary is determined by various factors, including but not limited to, the scope and responsibilities of the position, the individual's experience, education, knowledge, skills, and competencies, as well as geographic location and business and contract considerations. Depending on the position, employees may be eligible for overtime, shift differential, and a discretionary bonus in addition to base pay.

Benefits Statement: Peraton offers eligible employees a variety of benefits including medical, dental, vision, life, health savings account, short/long term disability, EAP, parental leave, 401(k), paid time off (PTO) for vacation, and company paid holidays. A full listing of available benefits can be viewed at https://www.careers.peraton.com/benefits.

Application Statements: The application period for the job is estimated to be 30 days from the job posting date. However, this timeline may be shortened or extended depending on business needs and the availability of qualified candidates. By applying to this job, you are expressing interest in the role and the Company. During the review of your application, you may be required to participate in an on-camera interview, as well as participate in a process to verify your identity.

EEO:Equal opportunity employer, including disability and protected veterans, or other characteristics protected by law.

  • Proficiency in GIS tools (ArcGIS, QGIS) and geospatial analysis
  • Experience with network visualization tools (Palantir, Maltego, or equivalent)
  • Familiarity with military mapping standards and operational overlays
  • Knowledge of USINDOPACOM geographic AOR and theater infrastructure
  • U.S Citizenship required
  • Active TS with ability to obtain/maintain SCI

Details

Target Salary Range: $135,000 - $216,000. This represents the typical salary range for this position. Salary is determined by various factors, including but not limited to, the scope and responsibilities of the position, the individual's experience, education, knowledge, skills, and competencies, as well as geographic location and business and contract considerations. Depending on the position, employees may be eligible for overtime, shift differential, and a discretionary bonus in addition to base pay.

Benefits Statement: Peraton offers eligible employees a variety of benefits including medical, dental, vision, life, health savings account, short/long term disability, EAP, parental leave, 401(k), paid time off (PTO) for vacation, and company paid holidays. A full listing of available benefits can be viewed at https://www.careers.peraton.com/benefits.

Application Statements: The application period for the job is estimated to be 30 days from the job posting date. However, this timeline may be shortened or extended depending on business needs and the availability of qualified candidates. By applying to this job, you are expressing interest in the role and the Company. During the review of your application, you may be required to participate in an on-camera interview, as well as participate in a process to verify your identity.

EEO:Equal opportunity employer, including disability and protected veterans, or other characteristics protected by law.

Title: Staff Data Analyst
Description:
About Our Client: The organization operates in the financial advisory industry, addressing the challenge of providing personalized, objective financial advice without asset minimums. It combines certified financial planning expertise with AI and automation to offer holistic financial planning at an affordable flat membership fee. The company has been nationally recognized for its approach and service quality, with high ratings from reputable sources.







About the Opportunity: The Staff Data Analyst role focuses on delivering high-impact insights to operations, product, and leadership teams to enhance business performance. This position serves as a strategic advisor, using advanced data analysis and reporting to influence executive decision-making and drive improvements in growth, margin, and retention.







Responsibilities:







Act as a strategic analytical partner to senior leadership and executive management.
Proactively identify opportunities to optimize business performance and work with cross-functional teams to implement solutions.
Perform deep-dive exploratory data analysis using Jupyter Notebooks.
Develop and maintain interactive data reporting tools using Python, Streamlit, and BigQuery-connected Google Sheets.
Integrate AI-assisted tools and automation to enhance analytical workflows.
Collect, clean, and model data from various sources ensuring accuracy.
Conduct peer reviews of analytical code and methodologies to ensure quality.




Qualifications:







Over 7 years of experience in analytical, decision science, or advanced business intelligence roles with influence on senior management decisions.
Strong stakeholder management and communication skills.
Proficiency in Python (including Pandas, Numpy), Streamlit, SQL, dbt, and cloud data warehouses like BigQuery or Snowflake.
Expertise with Jupyter Notebooks for data analysis and statistical validation.
Experience with AI tools and workflow automation for coding and analysis.
Ability to create business-facing reports using Google Sheets connected to cloud warehouses.
Understanding of consumer tech business metrics such as LTV, retention, CAC, ARR, margin, and cohort analysis.
Knowledge of secure data handling and customer privacy best practices.
Proven ability to translate business problems into analytical approaches with measurable outcomes.
Experience with version control systems such as Git.




Preferred Skills:







Experience in financial planning, fintech, or consumer technology industries.




Pay Range and Compensation Package: Base salary range: $170,000 - $200,000 plus bonus. Equity ownership in a rapidly growing company.

Title: Upholster
Description:
Work as an assembly team to manufacture sofas, loveseats, and chairs. This position requires manual dexterity, fine motor skills, and attention to detail to meet high quality standards.

Summary of essential job functions:


Assemble sofa, chair, or furniture frames
Attaches spring assembly section to seat and back of frame with clips or ties springs with twine and tacks ends of twine to frame
Places padding and covering over seat springs and tacks or staples covering to frame to complete seat upholstering, using tack hammer or powered staple gun
Places padding and covering over inside of arms and tacks or staples covering to frame to complete inside arms
Places layers of padding over inside back, shaping padding to specifications, and tacks or staples covering over padding to make inside back
Tacks or staples cardboard, padding, and upholstery material to top, side, and bottom rails of outside arms, fitting and shaping materials to obtain smooth contour
Tacks or staples covering material to top, bottom, and side rails of back frame, and sews upholstery covering edges to adjoining inside back and outside arm coverings with needle and thread to complete upholstery of furniture piece
Tacks or staples cover to bottom rails to enclose bottom area. May attach trimming material, such as gimp, braid, binding, skirts, and panels to upholstered frames, using glue, staples, nails, or tacks
May be designated according to part or pieces upholstered as Arm Builder; Back Builder; Seat Builder, etc. Other duties to be performed as directed by supervisor(s)
Other tasks as assigned


Minimum requirements:


High school diploma preferred but not required, and previous upholstery/Framing experience highly preferred
Good hand-eye coordination and manual dexterity
Attention to detail/high quality expectations
Must perform job with safety as a top priority
Must be able to show up to work on-time, every day, and take direction from supervisor(s)
Ability to work in a fast-paced environment
Must be flexible to move to different jobs/lines/departments when needed
Must be able to stand on feet for entire shift (8 to 10 hrs per day)
Ability to get along with others and work in a team environment
Must be able to lift up to 50 lbs repetitively on a daily basis


Benefits:


401K with employer match
Great Medical, Dental and Vision plans
Paid Holidays
Life Insurance options
Employee Referral Bonus

Description:
Role Description This part-time, remote entry-level role offers beginner-friendly virtual work with an immediate start date. Day-to-day tasks may include basic data entry, updating spreadsheets, organizing digital files, and assisting with simple online research. The role can also involve responding to emails, scheduling virtual meetings, and supporting administrative processes under clear guidance. Team members collaborate with supervisors and colleagues through online communication tools, follow documented procedures, and complete assigned tasks within agreed deadlines. Training and support are provided to help new hires become comfortable with the tools, workflows, and expectations of the position.
Qualifications

Ability to perform basic computer tasks, including using email, web browsers, and office productivity tools (word processing, spreadsheets).
Strong attention to detail and accuracy when handling data, documents, or online information.
Clear written and verbal communication skills to interact with team members and follow instructions.
Reliable time management skills, including the ability to organize tasks, meet deadlines, and work independently in a remote setting.
Comfort with learning new digital platforms and following step-by-step procedures or training materials.
Professional and respectful attitude when working with colleagues, clients, or partners in virtual environments.
Access to a stable internet connection and a suitable device for remote work (computer or laptop is preferred).
No prior experience is required; previous exposure to administrative, customer service, or online work is an asset.

Title: Business Analyst
Description:
Job Summary:

We are seeking a detail-oriented and strategic Business Analyst to join our remote team. The ideal candidate will work closely with stakeholders to identify business needs, analyze processes, and deliver data-driven solutions that improve efficiency and support organizational goals.




Key Responsibilities:

Gather, analyze, and document business requirements from stakeholders
Translate business needs into functional specifications and user stories
Analyze current processes and recommend improvements
Collaborate with product, engineering, and data teams to implement solutions
Create reports, dashboards, and presentations to support decision-making
Conduct gap analysis and impact assessments
Support testing, validation, and deployment of new systems or features
Monitor project progress and ensure alignment with business objectives




Required Skills & Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Finance, IT, or a related field
2–5 years of experience as a Business Analyst or similar role
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Proficiency in tools like Excel, SQL, and business intelligence tools (Tableau, Power BI)
Experience with requirement gathering and documentation (BRD, FRD, user stories)
Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills
Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodologies




Preferred Qualifications:

Certification such as CBAP, CCBA, or PMI-PBA
Experience with project management tools (JIRA, Confluence, Asana, etc.)
Basic knowledge of data analysis or programming (Python, R)
Experience in industries like finance, healthcare, or technology

Title: Chief Information Officer (CIO)
Description:
Chief Information Officer (CIO) Confidential – Premier Restaurant Group | Dallas, TX | Full-Time | Executive Leadership




CONFIDENTIAL SEARCH: The identity of the hiring organization is being withheld at this time. Qualified candidates will receive full details upon mutual interest. All inquiries will be handled with the utmost discretion.




About the Opportunity

A confidential, family-owned Premier Restaurant Group — one of the largest multi-unit operators in the country with over 500 locations across five nationally recognized brands and a substantial commercial real estate portfolio — is conducting an executive search for a Chief Information Officer. This is a transformational leadership opportunity to build, modernize, and own the technology vision for an organization of significant scale and complexity.

Reporting directly to the CEO and serving on the senior leadership team, the CIO will align technology strategy with business objectives across restaurant operations, real estate, finance, and corporate infrastructure. This leader will be empowered to assess, architect, and execute a best-in-class technology roadmap.




What You'll Own

Technology Strategy & Vision

Develop and own the enterprise-wide IT strategy aligned to growth goals across 500+ restaurant locations and a 75+ asset real estate portfolio
Serve as the primary technology advisor to the CEO, President, and ownership team — translating complex technology decisions into clear business outcomes
Establish a multi-year technology roadmap covering infrastructure, cybersecurity, data/analytics, restaurant systems, and enterprise applications

Restaurant & Operations Technology

Oversee selection, implementation, and optimization of POS systems, back-of-house platforms, digital ordering, loyalty integrations, and franchise-facing technology tools
Partner with Brand and Operations leadership to identify technology-driven efficiencies and guest experience improvements across all five restaurant concepts
Evaluate and manage vendor relationships across restaurant tech, third-party delivery platforms, and franchisor system requirements

Enterprise IT & Infrastructure

Lead all enterprise IT functions including networks, hardware, cloud infrastructure, helpdesk, and end-user support across corporate and field locations
Build and enforce a robust cybersecurity framework protecting company data, POS systems, and guest information
Oversee ERP, HRIS, and financial systems integrations to support cross-functional reporting needs

Data, Analytics & Innovation

Build the company's data infrastructure and analytics capabilities to drive better decision-making across operations, marketing, real estate, and finance
Champion adoption of AI, automation, and emerging technologies to improve efficiency and competitive positioning
Establish KPIs and dashboards that give leadership real-time visibility into operational and financial performance

Team Leadership & Vendor Management

Recruit, develop, and lead a high-performing IT team — building structure, accountability, and a culture of continuous improvement
Manage IT budget, vendor contracts, and technology spend with a focus on ROI and scalability
Collaborate cross-functionally with Finance, HR, Marketing, Legal, and Operations to ensure technology enables every department




What You Bring

10+ years of progressive IT leadership, with at least 3–5 years in a senior role (CIO, CTO, VP of IT, or equivalent)
Proven experience in multi-unit restaurant, retail, hospitality, or franchise environments strongly preferred
Track record leading enterprise technology transformations — infrastructure modernization, system migrations, or digital transformation at scale
Deep understanding of restaurant technology ecosystems: POS (e.g., Oracle MICROS, Toast, PAR), digital ordering, loyalty platforms, and third-party delivery integrations
Strong command of cybersecurity principles, compliance frameworks, and data privacy best practices
Experience building IT teams, managing budgets, and overseeing vendor relationships
Exceptional executive communication skills — able to present technology strategy to a family-owned leadership team in plain business terms
Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or related field required; MBA or advanced degree preferred




What's Offered

Competitive executive compensation package — details provided upon advancement in the process
Comprehensive benefits including medical, dental, and vision coverage
Retirement savings plan and paid time off
Direct access to CEO and family ownership team
The opportunity to define and build an enterprise IT function from the ground up at a company with real scale and decades of success




This organization is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.

Title: Lease Administrator
Description:
Job Title: Lease Administrator

Location: Andover, MA (Onsite)

Duration: 6-Month Contract (Potential for Extension)

Employment Type: Contract

Job Summary

We are seeking a detail-oriented Lease Administrator to support the Real Estate team by managing lease documentation, maintaining property records, processing lease payments, and ensuring the accuracy of lease agreements and related documentation. The ideal candidate will have experience in lease administration, commercial real estate, or property management, along with strong organizational and analytical skills.

This role requires close collaboration with internal departments including Legal, Accounting, Treasury, Engineering, Construction, and Facilities to ensure timely execution and administration of real estate agreements.

Key Responsibilities

Prepare, distribute, and process lease execution packages and related documentation.
Review lease agreements and real property documents to ensure accuracy, completeness, and compliance.
Process fully executed lease agreements and maintain proper documentation.
Prepare lease agreements, amendments, renewals, and associated real estate documents.
Maintain electronic and physical property records and lease files.
Record lease agreements and other real property documents with applicable land registries.
Process check requests and assist with lease payment administration.
Coordinate lease payments to landowners and verify payment accuracy.
Track lease renewals, expiration dates, critical milestones, and contractual obligations.
Maintain and update lease information in systems such as Archibus, Quorum, or other lease management platforms.
Support the onboarding of new real estate projects by gathering, reviewing, and organizing project documentation.
Coordinate with cross-functional teams including Legal, Accounting, Treasury, Engineering, Construction, and Facilities.
Generate reports, reconcile lease data, and ensure database accuracy.
Perform general administrative duties in support of the Real Estate department.

Required Qualifications

Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Real Estate, Finance, Accounting, or a related field, or equivalent work experience.
2+ years of experience in lease administration, property administration, commercial real estate, or a related field.
Experience reviewing and interpreting commercial lease agreements.
Strong organizational skills with exceptional attention to detail.
Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
Ability to manage multiple priorities while meeting deadlines.
Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, particularly Microsoft Excel.

Preferred Qualifications

Experience with lease management systems such as Archibus, Quorum, MRI, Yardi, SAP RE, or CoStar.
Experience with lease abstraction and lease database management.
Knowledge of commercial lease administration processes.
Understanding of lease economics, rent calculations, CAM reconciliations, and operating expenses.
Experience processing invoices, lease payments, and financial reconciliations.

Title: Financial Analys
Description:
Role Description The Financial Analyst role at Gems Setra is a part-time, remote position focused on supporting financial planning, analysis, and reporting activities. Day-to-day responsibilities include preparing and reviewing financial reports, analyzing trends and variances, and helping to forecast revenue, costs, and profitability. The role collaborates with cross-functional teams to provide data-driven insights for decision-making and supports budgeting and long-range planning processes. The Financial Analyst also assists in maintaining accurate financial records, improving reporting efficiency, and communicating key findings to stakeholders in a clear and accessible manner.

Qualifications

Strong foundation in Finance, including knowledge of financial statements and core financial concepts.
Proficiency in Financial Planning and Financial Reporting to support budgeting, forecasting, and performance tracking.
Advanced Analytical Skills, including the ability to interpret data, identify trends, and develop meaningful insights.
Clear and effective Communication skills to present complex financial information to both financial and non-financial stakeholders.
Experience with spreadsheet tools and financial modeling (e.g., Excel or similar), and familiarity with ERP or financial systems is beneficial.
Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
Ability to work independently in a remote setting, manage multiple priorities, and meet deadlines in a part-time schedule.
Exposure to manufacturing, technology, or industrial products environments is a plus.

The role collaborates with cross-functional teams to provide data-driven insights for decision-making and supports budgeting and long-range planning processes. The Financial Analyst also assists in maintaining accurate financial records, improving reporting efficiency, and communicating key findings to stakeholders in a clear and accessible manner.

Qualifications

  • Strong foundation in Finance, including knowledge of financial statements and core financial concepts.
  • Proficiency in Financial Planning and Financial Reporting to support budgeting, forecasting, and performance tracking.
  • Advanced Analytical Skills, including the ability to interpret data, identify trends, and develop meaningful insights.
  • Clear and effective Communication skills to present complex financial information to both financial and non-financial stakeholders.
  • Experience with spreadsheet tools and financial modeling (e.g., Excel or similar), and familiarity with ERP or financial systems is beneficial.
  • Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
  • Ability to work independently in a remote setting, manage multiple priorities, and meet deadlines in a part-time schedule.
  • Exposure to manufacturing, technology, or industrial products environments is a plus.

Title: Business Intelligence Specialist
Description:
Business Intelligence Specialist | Elite AmLaw Law Firm | New York / New Jersey | Hybrid




The best intelligence professionals don't just gather information—they create competitive advantages. We're conducting a confidential search for an AmLaw law firm seeking a Business Intelligence Specialist to join its high-performing Marketing & Business Development team.




You'll become a strategic advisor to firm leadership, practice group leaders, attorneys, and business development executives by delivering the market intelligence that influences client strategy, lateral recruiting, competitive positioning, and firm growth initiatives.

If you enjoy connecting information others overlook and transforming research into executive-level business decisions, this is the opportunity you've been waiting for.

Position Highlights




📍 Location: New York City or Northern New Jersey

💼 Schedule: Hybrid (Monday & Friday Remote | Tuesday–Thursday In Office)

💰 Compensation: $100,000 - $115,000

⏰ Full-Time | Monday-Friday




This position sits at the intersection of legal strategy, business development, competitive intelligence, and market research. You'll work directly with attorneys and firm leadership to provide actionable intelligence that supports:




• High-profile client pitches and RFP responses

• Strategic business development initiatives

• Lateral partner and attorney recruiting

• Industry and market trend analysis

• Competitive positioning

• Executive briefings

• Client expansion and cross-selling opportunities

• Practice group growth strategies




You'll develop sophisticated research including:




Company profiles
SWOT analyses
Industry reports
Executive biographies
Competitive intelligence
Transaction and deal analysis
Market opportunity assessments
Relationship mapping
Target prospect research




You'll also help identify emerging industries, legal market trends, and business opportunities before competitors do. This opportunity offers exposure to many of the industry's premier research platforms, including:




✔ PitchBook

✔ Capital IQ

✔ Bloomberg Law

✔ LexisNexis

✔ Westlaw

✔ Microsoft Excel

✔ Power BI

✔ AI-assisted research tools and emerging intelligence platforms

Title: Personal Care Assistant - Sign On Bonus
Description:
Eminence Home Care is seeking dedicated Personal Care Assistants (PCAs) to support individuals in their daily lives and enhance their quality of living!

As a Personal Care Assistant, you will provide essential care and assistance to clients in their homes or hospital settings. Your compassionate and attentive approach will help improve their comfort and well-being, enabling them to live as independently as possible.

Key Responsibilities:


Assist clients with activities of daily living, including bathing, grooming, dressing, and toileting
Support clients with mobility, transferring them safely and securely when needed
Provide companionship and psychological support, promoting a positive atmosphere
Help with meal planning and preparation, ensuring nutritional needs are met
Perform light housekeeping duties, including laundry and maintaining a clean environment


Compensation: $18.00 - $20.00 per hour, based on experience.

Requirements


Previous experience as a Personal Care Assistant or in a related field is preferred
Empathetic and kind attitude towards patients
Strong communication skills, both verbal and written
Reliable, punctual, and trustworthy
Must have a valid driver's license and reliable transportation
Up-to-date immunizations and negative TB test required
High school diploma or GED is preferred
Ability to work both independently and collaboratively within a team setting


Benefits


Paid Time Off
Sign On Bonus - up to $500
Travel Time Reimbursement
Employee Assistance Program/Health Concierge Services
Working Advantage (Employee Discounts)


Who are we?

Eminence Home Care, an affiliate of Ultimate Care, is a licensed home care provider located in New Hampshire, Connecticut, Maryland, New Jersey & Pennsylvania. We offer comprehensive home care services where we lead with our hearts to offer top quality and empathetic home care services.

Our mission is to provide and restore client dignity and independence in their homes through individualized care plans to reduce caregiver role and stress on family members while avoiding nursing homes and assisted living facilities.

Why choose us?

At Eminence Home Care, we are dedicated to fostering a people-centric culture that is pivotal for success in the contemporary home care landscape. Our unwavering commitment begins with inspiring and empowering our employees to unleash their full potential. We actively pursue avenues to cultivate a dynamic learning environment, allowing our team members to explore and nurture their passions and talents. Our goal is to facilitate holistic growth, both personally and professionally, within the workplace and beyond. Join us on this journey of empowerment and achievement!

We're committed to creating a diverse, inclusive, and authentic workplace. If you're enthusiastic about the role but don't meet every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply. You could be the ideal candidate for this or other roles!

Eminence Home Care is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected under federal, state, or local law.

Eminence Home Care does not accept resumes from unsolicited search firms nor recruiters.

Title: SW Development Intern/Data Analytics
Description:
This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a SW Development Intern/Data Analytics based in the United States.

The SW Development Intern/Data Analytics will support software development and data analytics initiatives within a technology-focused environment.

This internship provides hands-on experience working with databases, migration projects, SQL optimization, and data visualization tools.

The successful candidate will contribute to projects that improve system performance, enhance reporting capabilities, and support data-driven decision-making.

This role offers an opportunity to collaborate with experienced engineers while developing practical skills in software development and analytics.

The position is ideal for a motivated student or early-career professional interested in combining programming, database management, and business insights.

The intern will gain exposure to real-world technology challenges while contributing to solutions that support connected and innovative products.

Accountabilities

The SW Development Intern/Data Analytics will assist with software development, database management, and analytics projects while gaining practical experience in engineering workflows. This role requires attention to detail, problem-solving abilities, and a willingness to learn new technologies in a collaborative environment.


Support the planning, coordination, and execution of database migration projects.
Analyze existing database structures and assist in developing migration strategies that minimize disruption and maintain data integrity.
Optimize SQL queries, stored procedures, views, and database structures to improve system performance and efficiency.
Develop and maintain data visualization dashboards using tools such as Grafana to analyze regression results.
Assist engineering teams with software development and data analysis activities.
Review technical requirements and contribute to solutions that improve system functionality.
Support testing, reporting, and documentation activities related to development projects.
Collaborate with team members to troubleshoot issues and identify opportunities for process improvements.
Apply analytical thinking to evaluate data and communicate meaningful insights.


Requirements

The ideal candidate is a motivated learner with an interest in software development, database technologies, and data analytics. This opportunity requires foundational technical knowledge, strong problem-solving skills, and the ability to work effectively with engineering teams.


Interest in software development, data analytics, database systems, or related technology fields.
Familiarity with SQL and relational database concepts.
Understanding of software development principles and data management practices.
Ability to analyze technical information and identify solutions.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Attention to detail and ability to work on structured technical tasks.
Ability to collaborate effectively in a team environment.
Willingness to learn new tools, technologies, and development processes.
Strong communication and organizational skills.
Experience with data visualization tools, database migration projects, or programming languages is a plus.


Benefits


Competitive internship compensation ranging approximately from $19-$35 per hour, depending on qualifications, experience, and location.
Opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software development and data analytics.
Exposure to real-world database migration, optimization, and visualization projects.
Collaboration with experienced technology professionals.
Professional development opportunities in a global technology environment.
Paid time off benefits for eligible employees.
Health, life, and disability insurance options.
401(k) retirement program.
Bonus program eligibility.
Flexible home office work environment.


How Jobgether Works

We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.

We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

Why Apply Through Jobgether?

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

Title: Quantitative Analyst
Description:
The Commodities Quantitative Research and PM Engagement team works with portfolio managers with specific focus on portfolio risk and optimization, deliver analytics, and provide actionable insights and best practices that drive business growth and enhance profitability.




The Commodities Quantitative Analyst works alongside investment teams to develop quantitative models and analytical tools for portfolio risk analysis and portfolio construction. This role is key to enhance profitability and scalability across the Commodities business.




Key Responsibilities

Develop and enhance quantitative framework and models for portfolio risk and portfolio optimization.
Conduct quantitative analysis and share insights with portfolio managers and business management.
Partner with investment teams to assess fundamentals, evaluate trade risk, and support investment decisions
Contribute to best practices in risk analysis, portfolio construction, and quantitative research across the Commodities platform




Qualifications

Fresh graduates or candidates with 1-2 years of experience
Undergraduate or graduate degree in a quantitative field, such as math, statistics, engineering, physics, financial engineering, or a related field
Experience as a quantitative analyst, strategist or risk quant in a commodity trading firm, bank, or hedge fund
Strong foundation in statistics, time series analysis, and quantitative modeling
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Proficiency in Python
Ability to communicate technical concepts clearly and effectively

Title: Junior Litigation Associate
Description:
Real Work, From Day One.

Mueller Christensen LLP is looking for a Junior Litigation Associate with 2+ years of experience, someone early in their career who is hungry for real litigation work, not a paper-shuffling apprenticeship.

At a boutique firm, you will not spend your first two years reviewing documents in a windowless room. You will be in the work, drafting discovery, preparing for depositions, arguing routine motions, and building the skills that take years to develop at larger firms. You will also be seen. Partners will know your name because they will be working directly alongside you.

Title: Technical AIP Data Analyst
Description:
Founded in 2011, Altenar Technology Limited is a leading igaming software provider inspired by the vision of our customers. As our platform has scaled we have begun to generate high volumes of transactional data which can be potentially mined to generate additional insights. The Altenar Intelligence Platform (AIP) is the long term vision for unlocking this potential.




We are seeking a Technical AIP Data Analyst to join the Technology team to work closely with various Product and Business stakeholders to focus on using data pipelines and various analytical techniques to analyse business procedures. The role requires outstanding communication skills, proven ability to build and manage medium-scale modelling projects, define scope of existing infrastructure, identify data requirements, build methodology and tools that are well researched, undertake feasibility studies, and support with documentation. The candidate will be expected to demonstrate familiarity with concepts such as ETL, machine learning and statistics.




The successful applicant should illustrate comfort working in a startup environment, possessing high intellectual curiosity with ability to quickly learn new concepts/frameworks, algorithms and technology that powers Alternar business objectives. We seek someone with a high degree of ownership that can effectively examine flows of data, researching and evaluating to consistently deliver superior quality results on-time. The successful candidate should be able to rapidly prototype analytical models with the goal of generating strategic business insights as per the needs of the AIP roadmap.




Finally, the applicant is expected to display a high degree of independence working across multiple programs and initiatives to un-earth opportunities. The role demands strong data organisation, data structure, and data hierarchy knowledge, and may be suited to incumbents with extensive Data Analysis and/or computing programming experience.




The activities of a Technical AIP Data Analyst include but are not limited to:




Continuously updating core knowledge and skills in SQL and Python or R as applied to mathematical analysis
Liaises with internal stakeholders including the Solution Architect and Business Analysts, and directly with key Product and Business owners on topics for exploration and their description
Liaises with internal stakeholders including Data Engineers, Infrastructure Engineers and Data Services Engineers on data collection, movement and storage strategies
Analyse and Build analytical applications in a structured manner that can be tested and deployed based on stakeholder requirements
Undertake feasibility studies and various types of analytics including descriptive, diagnostic, predictive or prescriptive analytics.
Communicate the impact of technologies by delivering views, dashboards and report configurations using BI tools as required by internal stakeholders
Supporting software architecture processes with data handling and visualisation specifications
Participation in the Architecture Review process (including by providing advice and assistance) to ensure new initiatives or major changes to the Altenar product portfolio have data flow considerations represented at the inception phase
Examine existing business models and flows of data and design functional specifications by participating in the research, test, design of new data services tools for online or warehoused data
Work in a fast-paced, dynamic, multinational, multicultural environment
Creating and maintaining documentation for the solutions provided




Qualifications

Experience working with python and pandas
Strong SQL querying skills
Knowledge of noSQL and ETL operations considered a plus
Strong analytical and forecasting skills using offline methods such as spreadsheets
Strong math and statistics background (relevant Degree education required)
Proven experience with one or more BI tools (Metabase, Apache Superset, Redash, PowerBI, Tableau, Qlikview)
Ability to quickly write ad-hoc scripts to analyze small to medium datasets.
Strong research and validation skills
Motivated and self-driven to work in an environment with minimal supervision
Strong presentation skills
Proficient in spoken and written English
Experience in Technical Data Analytics, Data Science (Computing), and/or Product Management roles
Graduate-level education in Computer Science, Engineering, Math, Statistics, Economics, or other relevant field




Preferred Experience

Experience with Spark core functionality such as Spark SQL, Spark Structured Streaming is very desirable
Some experience in using Git version control in the context of documentation/source code management
Knowledge of Linux CLI tools to perform "quick and dirty" command line analysis to serve as first exploratory review of data
Some knowledge of MLaaS such as Amazon Machine Learning services, Azure Machine Learning, Google AI Platform, and IBM Watson Machine Learning
Experience in building, testing and validating machine learning algorithms
Prior direct or indirect involvement in data warehouse design, tool selection and support
Experience with Data Lab concepts with Hue, Zeppelin, Jupyterhub
Experience with Hadoop/HDFS - CLI, HDFS access from scripts
Knowledge of C# or Java is considered an asset

Title: Business Intelligence Analyst
Description:
Casumo is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

Join us at Casumo, where you are invited to be your authentic YOU-MO!

Company Overview

Welcome to Casumo, your passport to a world of fun, excitement, and responsible gaming. We're an international online casino company with a knack for creating unforgettable gaming experiences. Our secret sauce? A blend of innovation, security, and a dash of playful charm.

Nowadays, we're on the hunt for an analytical and collaborative Business Intelligence Analyst!

Position Overview

The Business Intelligence Analyst is responsible for developing, maintaining, and improving reporting and analytics solutions that support business decision making across the organization. The role works closely with Business Intelligence Analyst Lead, Senior Business Analysts, Data Engineers and business stakeholders to deliver accurate, scalable, and user-friendly reports. The BI Analyst translates defined business requirements into dashboards, reports and analyses.

Responsibilities


Design, develop, and maintain dashboards, reports, and self-service reporting solutions primarily using Tableau.
Develop and maintain SQL queries, reporting views, calculations, and supporting reporting logic.
Validate reporting accuracy and ensure KPI logic is implemented correctly.
Apply dimensional modelling and reporting best practices in analytics solutions
Ensure dashboards and reports are visually clear, user-friendly, and aligned with the best reporting practices.
Support the maintenance and enhancement of existing reporting solutions.
Perform ad-hoc analyses to support operational and tactical business decision-making.
Investigate data discrepancies, incidents, and reporting issues.
Analyze datasets to identify trends, anomalies, and actionable insights.
Collaborate with Business Analyst Lead and Senior Business Analysts to deliver reporting and analytics solutions based on defined business requirements.
Communicate with stakeholders regarding reporting functionality, enhancements, and issue resolution.
Provide support and guidance to end-users on reporting usage and available data sources.
Maintain documentation for reports, dashboards, and reporting logic
Identify opportunities to automate and improve recurring reporting processes.


Requirements


A bachelor’s degree in business administration, finance, computer science, data science, economics, statistics, or a related field.
2+ years of experience in data analysis, business analysis, or a related field.
Good knowledge of the iGaming industry including key operational business processes, metrics, and key performance indicators (KPIs).
Strong SQL skills including joins, aggregations, subqueries, and reporting logic development.
Experience developing dashboards and reports using Tableau.
Good understanding of data warehousing and dimensional modelling concepts.
Familiarity with ETL concepts and reporting-oriented data structures.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Ability to interpret data and provide actionable insights.
Good understanding of business KPIs and reporting requirements.
Strong communication skills with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
Ability to manage multiple tasks and priorities in a fast-paced environment.
Experience working in SCRUM or agile environments is considered a plus.


Think we're a good match? Apply now!

The Perks

Malta Office

Being a part of the Casumo group provides an unparalleled experience. You’ll find yourself surrounded by the brightest minds within the most inspiring and collaborative office spaces! In addition to that, you’ll enjoy:


Private health insurance
Wellness incentives, including a fitness allowance and mental well-being services
Flexible national holidays: public holidays mean more time off, choose how and when to enjoy them!
2 weeks Work From Anywhere (10 days), increased to 4 weeks (20 days) after longer duration of employment within the Company: explore the world while working remotely
Gourmet lunches and healthy snacks prepared by our in-house chef
Variety of discounts from local vendors
Access to some of the greatest tools and platforms for developing your professional skills and building success within your role
A range of training courses, known as Casumo College, for continuous learning and growth
Social events for building strong relationships with colleagues from all across the organisation


Macedonia Office


Private health insurance
Wellness incentives, including a fitness allowance and mental well-being services
2 weeks Work From Anywhere (10 days), increased to 4 weeks (20 days) after longer duration of employment within the Company: explore the world while working remotely
Office lunches - three times per week
Access to some of the greatest tools and platforms for developing your professional skills and building success within your role
A range of training courses, known as Casumo College, for continuous learning and growth
Social events for building strong relationships with colleagues from all across the organisation


Zagreb Office


Private health insurance
Wellness incentives, including a fitness allowance and mental well-being services
2 weeks Work From Anywhere (10 days), increased to 4 weeks (20 days) after longer duration of employment within the Company: explore the world while working remotely
Food allowance
Access to some of the greatest tools and platforms for developing your professional skills and building success within your role
A range of training courses, known as Casumo College, for continuous learning and growth
Social events for building strong relationships with colleagues from all across the organisation


Our ABC Values

ASPIRE

At Casumo, "aspire" means pushing beyond the ordinary and transforming obstacles into stepping stones. Challenges are our breakfast of champions, and comfort zones are out of bounds. Mediocrity? Left behind. Our mantra? Dream big, aim high, and always be ready for the next adventure in innovation.

BELIEVE

Belief at Casumo isn't just a feel-good sticker; it's the glue that binds us. Turning "me" achievements into "we" victories, we're a tight-knit crew of dreamers, doers, and relentless supporters. With a high-five arsenal and a trusty cheerleading squad, we're on a mission to prove that together, we're not just strong; we're Casumo strong.

CARE

Care is our secret ingredient, the cherry on top of our game. It's not only about ensuring our players have a blast (responsibly, of course); it's about weaving a fabric of support so tight, even the toughest challenges can't tear us apart. From tailoring player experiences to being there for each other, we're all about creating memorable moments.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Join our Business Intelligence team, where data is transformed into insights that drive business performance and strategic decisions. You'll work with data from multiple sources, partnering with stakeholders across the business to define meaningful KPIs, build and maintain Tableau dashboards, and use SQL to uncover trends, validate data, and deliver actionable insights. Your work will directly influence decision-making, helping teams better understand performance, identify new opportunities, and continuously improve the way we use data to grow the business. If you're curious, analytical, and enjoy turning complex data into clear, impactful solutions, we'd love to hear from you.




Core responsibilities

Use SQL to extract, transform, and manage data from internal sources, ensuring it’s accurate and ready for analysis.
Analyze complex business problems, uncovering trends, root causes, and opportunities to improve performance.
Build and enhance Tableau reports and dashboards, turning data into clear, actionable insights for stakeholders.
Partner with product, management, and cross-functional teams to define KPIs and support data-driven decision-making.
Collaborate closely with BI teammates and data engineers to improve data pipelines, reduce technical debt, and scale the Data Warehouse.
Proactively explore data beyond assigned requests. Anticipate surface trends, risks, and opportunities to bring insights before issues arise.




Experience and key competencies

At least 2 years of experience in a Data Analyst, BI Analyst, or similar analytical role, supported by a relevant educational background (e.g. Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or a related field).
Strong SQL skills, including querying, transforming, and validating large datasets, writing complex queries, and optimizing performance. Knowledge of Python or R is an advantage.
Hands-on experience building and maintaining dashboards in Tableau (or a similar BI tool), with the ability to present complex data in a clear and actionable way.
Solid understanding of data modeling, KPI design, metrics documentation, and statistical methods, with the ability to apply them to real business challenges.
Strong stakeholder management and communication skills, with the ability to translate business needs into analytical solutions and communicate insights effectively.
Analytical mindset with the ability to balance attention to detail while keeping the bigger picture in focus.
Self-driven and adaptable, with strong ownership, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.
Fluency in verbal and written communication in English is essential, as it's our primary means of interaction.




Think of this job ad as more of a friendly guide than a rigid 'must-have' list. We're well aware that no one will tick all the boxes, so feel free to apply even if you're not a perfect match – we love close matches too!




Our benefits, Your happiness

Enjoy 28 days of vacation with the option to use your balance on business days only, effectively giving you up to 10 extra days off. Combined with flexible working hours, you can make the most of your time off.
Prioritize your well-being with monthly sports/health compensation, full sick leave coverage for the first 8 days, our in-house gym, and a chill games room to unwind.
Invest in your professional growth with an annual training budget that can be used for courses, certifications, workshops, and learning opportunities relevant to your role.
Our office is a cozy (and dog-friendly) haven right in the heart of the city. Enjoy complimentary fruits and beverages and free parking. It's the perfect place to be productive and feel right at home.
Be part of the most legendary events and make amazing connections with colleagues from across the entire company.
Thrive in a diverse, multicultural environment where innovation and new ideas are welcomed, independence is encouraged, success is celebrated, and you'll have the freedom to make a real impact alongside talented people from across the globe.
Comprehensive relocation support, including arranged travel and initial accommodation, to help you settle in smoothly from day one.
..plus, if you're not already a pro, we'll teach you how to play poker!




Recruitment flow

Interview - Task - Second Interview - Background check - Offer
Start date: ASAP
Open to candidates based in the EU.
Applications are open until we find the one - take the leap and apply now!




We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, ancestry, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender, gender identity or expression, age, disability, medical condition, pregnancy, marital status.




Compensation

At Coolbet, we carefully consider a wide range of factors when determining your salary, including market benchmarks, specific job family, background, location, skills, and experience. The typical range for this role is 3000€-3500€ gross per month. This reflects total compensation.




Location

Tallinn, Estonia




Coolbet is an award-winning gaming company delivering both B2C and B2B platforms across international markets. We offer sportsbook, casino, and poker experiences to players in 8 countries across 3 continents and provide advanced B2B solutions to operators in the US. Part of the Sega Sammy Creation gaming segment, our core team of 500+ experts collaborates across borders to create world-class experiences for both players and operators. With a strong presence at our Tallinn HQ, home to a diverse team representing over 50 nationalities, we bring different perspectives together to shape the future of gaming through continuous product development, a collaborative culture, and a strong commitment to responsible play. Find out more about Coolbet!

Title: Business Intelligence Analyst
Description:
Casumo is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

Join us at Casumo, where you are invited to be your authentic YOU-MO!

Company Overview

Welcome to Casumo, your passport to a world of fun, excitement, and responsible gaming. We're an international online casino company with a knack for creating unforgettable gaming experiences. Our secret sauce? A blend of innovation, security, and a dash of playful charm.

Nowadays, we're on the hunt for an analytical and collaborative Business Intelligence Analyst!

Position Overview

The Business Intelligence Analyst is responsible for developing, maintaining, and improving reporting and analytics solutions that support business decision making across the organization. The role works closely with Business Intelligence Analyst Lead, Senior Business Analysts, Data Engineers and business stakeholders to deliver accurate, scalable, and user-friendly reports. The BI Analyst translates defined business requirements into dashboards, reports and analyses.

Responsibilities


Design, develop, and maintain dashboards, reports, and self-service reporting solutions primarily using Tableau.
Develop and maintain SQL queries, reporting views, calculations, and supporting reporting logic.
Validate reporting accuracy and ensure KPI logic is implemented correctly.
Apply dimensional modelling and reporting best practices in analytics solutions
Ensure dashboards and reports are visually clear, user-friendly, and aligned with the best reporting practices.
Support the maintenance and enhancement of existing reporting solutions.
Perform ad-hoc analyses to support operational and tactical business decision-making.
Investigate data discrepancies, incidents, and reporting issues.
Analyze datasets to identify trends, anomalies, and actionable insights.
Collaborate with Business Analyst Lead and Senior Business Analysts to deliver reporting and analytics solutions based on defined business requirements.
Communicate with stakeholders regarding reporting functionality, enhancements, and issue resolution.
Provide support and guidance to end-users on reporting usage and available data sources.
Maintain documentation for reports, dashboards, and reporting logic
Identify opportunities to automate and improve recurring reporting processes.


Requirements


A bachelor’s degree in business administration, finance, computer science, data science, economics, statistics, or a related field.
2+ years of experience in data analysis, business analysis, or a related field.
Good knowledge of the iGaming industry including key operational business processes, metrics, and key performance indicators (KPIs).
Strong SQL skills including joins, aggregations, subqueries, and reporting logic development.
Experience developing dashboards and reports using Tableau.
Good understanding of data warehousing and dimensional modelling concepts.
Familiarity with ETL concepts and reporting-oriented data structures.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Ability to interpret data and provide actionable insights.
Good understanding of business KPIs and reporting requirements.
Strong communication skills with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
Ability to manage multiple tasks and priorities in a fast-paced environment.
Experience working in SCRUM or agile environments is considered a plus.


Think we're a good match? Apply now!

Malta Office

Private health insurance
Wellness incentives, including a fitness allowance and mental well-being services
Flexible national holidays: public holidays mean more time off, choose how and when to enjoy them!
2 weeks Work From Anywhere (10 days), increased to 4 weeks (20 days) after longer duration of employment within the Company: explore the world while working remotely
Gourmet lunches and healthy snacks prepared by our in-house chef
Variety of discounts from local vendors
Access to some of the greatest tools and platforms for developing your professional skills and building success within your role
A range of training courses, known as Casumo College, for continuous learning and growth
Social events for building strong relationships with colleagues from all across the organisation

Office lunches - three times per week

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Are you ready to join our digital revolution journey?

At Aleph , we’re not just part of the digital advertising landscape—we’re shaping its future. Representing the world’s leading platforms, including TikTok, Amazon, Google, and nearly 55 others, we operate in 130+ markets across new and existing geographies.

Our mission is to empower advertisers and brands to unlock the full potential of these platforms' advertising capabilities. By fostering long-lasting partnerships, we create limitless opportunities for people and businesses to advertise effectively at both local and global levels.

With a presence spanning continents, Aleph offers you the chance to be part of a fast-growing, innovative team where your work makes a direct impact. If you’re ambitious, forward-thinking, and eager to thrive in a dynamic, global environment, Aleph is the perfect place to build your career.

Role Overview

We are looking for a highly analytical Data Analyst to join our Business Intelligence team. You will act as a critical "backend engine," building the data foundations and analytical models that enable data-driven decisions for both our supply (platforms) and demand (sales) sides.

You will dive deep into complex datasets, build automated reporting pipelines, and uncover actionable insights that drive our strategy with global platforms like TikTok, Microsoft, Google, X, Spotify, and others.

What You 'll Do



Extract and analyze complex data.
Query, clean, and transform large datasets from multiple sources to uncover trends, performance metrics, and market insights that support strategic decision-making across the organization.
Build and maintain BI dashboards.
Design, develop, and maintain automated dashboards and reports using Looker Studio to provide real-time visibility into business performance for executive and partner discussions. Support strategic projects.
Conduct deep-dive analyses for platform RFP responses, Quarterly Business Reviews (QBRs), and strategic initiatives that shape Aleph’s partnerships and revenue strategy. Collaborate with cross-functional stakeholders.
Work closely with strategists, sales teams, and regional leadership to define data requirements, understand their business challenges, and deliver quantitative solutions.
Translate data into actionable recommendations.
Identify performance anomalies, revenue opportunities, and market risks by packaging raw data into structured, easy-to-consume analytical models and insights.
Ensure data integrity and governance.
Establish clear data validation frameworks, optimize queries, and maintain high standards for data accuracy and documentation internally.



Who You Are



Highly analytical and problem-solving oriented.
You have a strong quantitative background and enjoy tackling complex business questions through rigorous data analysis.
Technically proficient in data tools.
You possess strong SQL skills for data extraction and manipulation, and you are highly proficient in at least one major BI visualization tool (e.g., Power BI, Looker Studio). Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills are a must; experience with Python a strong plus. Business-minded.You don’t just pull numbers; you understand the business context behind the data and can connect your analysis directly to revenue growth, efficiency, and key opportunities.
A clear communicator. You can translate complex technical findings and data models into clear, actionable insights for non-technical stakeholders and leadership
Structured and detail-oriented. You are meticulous about data accuracy, organize your code and queries logically, and ensure all deliverables meet a high-quality standard before they reach stakeholders.
Interested in digital media or advertising.
Experience in digital advertising analytics, media agencies, ad-tech, or similar environments is a strong plus, though not strictly required.



What You'll Love About Us



We care about your individuality by giving you freedom to grow and create within the company, regardless of your position.
Work in a dynamic team in a fast-paced industry of an international company with multi-cultural teams around the world .
Learn from the best: Our state of the art workshops guarantee the latest insights into digital advertising.
In line with the EU Pay Transparency Directive, we are committed to fair and open compensation practices. For this role, the minimum gross annual base salary is 35,000 EUR.



In addition to base salary, this role includes a variable component, paid annually. The final offer will reflect your experience, skills, and the scope of the role.

#ALEPH

Why Join Us?

Aleph is a place of many cultures, perspectives, and talents. We support each other, creating an environment of giving and receiving. We value partnership and communication because we believe it takes a group of people to achieve great things. We are energized by our ever-changing industry, our curiosity keeps us learning and seeking out new opportunities.

We stay flexible and adaptable, and believe in moving with the speed of change. We encourage everyone to strive for more, providing our internal talent with growth opportunities and the ability to learn together.

#ALEPH

We use Lever, our recruitment management platform, which includes AI-powered features that may assist our hiring team in reviewing applications, analyzing CVs, and identifying relevant qualifications. These tools support - but do not replace - human judgement. All hiring decisions are made by people. For more information about how your personal data is processed, including your rights in relation to AI-assisted processing, please see our Candidate Privacy Policy or contact us at [email protected] .

About Nexters

Nexters is an international game development company that strives to introduce the joy of core gaming experiences to casual players. In 2021 we went public and listed on the NASDAQ (GDEV). Nexters is part of the GDEV holding, which includes not only Nexters, but also Cubic Games, Royal Ark, Game Gears studios.Our people work worldwide from offices in Cyprus, Armenia, and Kazakhstan or remotely. We want brilliant professionals who love building great games in a team with one of the best cultures.

About Your Role

We are seeking an experienced Data Analyst at the intersection of data and marketing to join the Data Ecosystem team and help transform data into actionable business tools. This role is not about traditional analytics and ad-hoc requests, but about building solutions - from research and prototyping to implementation of tools that are actively used by the marketing team in their daily work.

What You’ll Be Doing


Developing and improving data-driven tools to increase marketing team efficiency
Designing and prototyping automated solutions (including AI-based ones) to accelerate creative production and traffic acquisition
Working on algorithmic approaches to media buying and campaign optimization
Integrating with external data sources and advertising platforms
Conducting data research, identifying growth opportunities, and transforming them into practical tools
Promoting a data-driven culture and expanding access to useful analytics for marketing
Working end-to-end: from problem definition and research to implementation and impact on business metrics
Collaborating with marketing, UA leads, analysts, and engineers, aligning solutions across teams
Quickly diving into problem contexts and taking ownership of results


We hope that you have


Expert-level SQL and experience working with large-scale data (ClickHouse / BigQuery / Redshift / PostgreSQL)
Strong Python skills (pandas, numpy, scipy, statsmodels, sklearn, etc.)
Deep understanding of marketing metrics and unit economics (LTV, CAC, ROI, retention, payback)
Hands-on experience with advertising platforms (Meta, Google Ads, Axon, etc.) and MMPs (AppsFlyer, Adjust)
Experience in taking analytical solutions through to implementation and measurable business impact
Ability to work in ambiguity: independently define approaches and drive tasks to completion
Ability to rapidly prototype solutions and validate hypotheses
Proactivity: willingness to suggest improvements in processes, tools, and approaches
Strong communication skills: ability to discuss solutions, align with stakeholders, and collaborate across teams


Nice to have


Experience building production-ready solutions
Experience with PySpark / Databricks
Experience designing ETL pipelines (Airflow, Luigi, or similar)
Experience automating processes (including with AI)
Experience building tools for marketing or UA teams
Experience in mobile products or the gaming industry
Strong systems thinking: ability to structure problems, define logic, and design processes


What We Offer


Healthcare Medical care program (including dental service) or medical care compensation are available for you wherever you wish to work. The basic medical care program is also available for your family members if you choose to work from our official locations – Cyprus, Armenia, and Kazakhstan.
Work, life, and balance We offer a fair amount of paid vacation days and sick leave. You can work at one of our comfortable offices in official locations or from home.
Sports You can choose various sports activities like yoga, football, and volleyball in our official locations.
Relocation support A relocation package is available for you if you decide to join us in one of our official locations.
Skills improvement Let's learn languages: you can visit online English language courses. Greek and Armenian language lessons are available for everyone who works in Cyprus or Armenia. Our company encourages people of Nexters to take part in game jams, hackathons, and relevant conferences and meetups as expert speakers.
Community & ESG We are proud of our local communities and support employees’ social initiatives. Dream big, act big: Nexters contribute to gaming’s positive impact on the world, hold a sustainability strategy, and take part in charity projects all over the world.


Work format

In one of the company's offices in Armenia, Cyprus, Kazakhstan or remotely.
